description_long: This is a vintage, early 20th-century flatbed truck with a dark green body and black fenders, featuring a boxy, upright cab with a simple roof and open sides. The front end is characterized by a rounded hood, brass-accented headlights, and large spoked wheels, giving it a classic antique appearance. The cargo area consists of a wooden flatbed with vertical slats along the sides, suitable for transporting goods or materials. The interior is minimally detailed, with a visible steering wheel and basic controls. The vehicle's design suggests it is built primarily from metal and wood, with exposed mechanical components and a utilitarian structure. Its overall form and features are reminiscent of early Ford Model T trucks commonly seen in historical urban and rural settings.
description: A vintage green flatbed truck with a boxy cab, spoked wheels, and a wooden cargo bed with side slats. Brass headlights and classic design evoke early 20th-century vehicles.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded hood, brass headlights, upright windshield, and spoked front wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cab, steering wheel, and the full length of the wooden flatbed with side slats.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the open wooden cargo bed, vertical slats, and the back of the cab with a small rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cab, spoked wheels, and the wooden flatbed structure.
attribute_headlight_design: Two round brass headlights mounted on either side of the front grille
